title: ornduffia albiflora
intro: Ornduffia albiflora, also known as the white-flowered Ornduffia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Alismataceae. It is native to Australia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as supporting the immune system and treating respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Ornduffia albiflora typically involve drying and processing the leaves and flowers, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
